description: Phase 2 chat-signal ingestion config (see IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md). Only the VOD path is implemented in Phase 2; live EventSub is deferred.

auto_fetch.description: When true, Stage 1 tries to fetch chat from Twitch GraphQL for any VOD whose filename matches `vod_id_pattern`. When false (default), users drop pre-downloaded chat JSON into `chat_dir` manually.
auto_fetch.note: client_id default is Twitch's public web client ID — same one used by lay295/TwitchDownloader and other community tools. Using this endpoint relies on an unofficial Twitch GraphQL API that can change without notice.

feature_windows.description: Baseline msgs/sec is computed over a rolling 5-minute window. Bursts ≥ 2σ above baseline are what Pass A scores against.

scoring.description: Caps on the chat signal's contribution to Pass A scores. Chat is additive to the existing keyword score — never replaces it.

ground_truth.description: Maps denylist category → which per-window event count must be non-zero for a claim mentioning that category to be allowed. Used by cascade_check when `hard_events` is provided (Phase 2.4d).
